title: The Rise of Generative UI for Developers (CopilotKit)
summary: CopilotKit is a framework enabling developers to build agent-native applications with generative UI capabilities. It helps render real UI components instead of basic chat windows, supports shared state with React and Next.js apps, and enables human-in-the-loop approval workflows for AI agents.
writeup: This video covers CopilotKit, a framework for building agent-native applications that render real UI components rather than basic chat windows. It matters because generative UI moves AI features beyond text boxes into interactive interfaces wired into existing apps. Key takeaways: CopilotKit supports shared state with React and Next.js applications, and it enables human-in-the-loop approval workflows for AI agents.
